message:
fix(causal): consolidate duplicate MS_PER_DAY constants in same function

MS_PER_DAY and MS_PER_DAY_TOTAL had identical values (86_400_000)
defined separately in the same function scope. Hoisted to a single
const before both usages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
